omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Exercising your right to opt-out of “sales” or “sharing” (or processing for targeted advertising purposes). While we do not sell personal information for money, like many companies, we use services that help deliver interest-based ads to you as described above. The State Privacy Laws may classify our use of some of these services as "sharing” your Personal Information with the advertising partners that provide the services, or processing Personal Information for targeted advertising purposes. You can submit requests to opt-out of "sharing" (or processing for targeted advertising purposes) or other "sales” of Personal Information, to the extent applicable, here (https://www.lg.com/us/caprivacy.com). As described above, you may also broadcast the Global Privacy Control (“GPC”) signal from your browser to opt-out of “sharing” (or processing for targeted advertising purposes) or other “sales” of Personal Information, to the extent applicable. We may sell or share the following categories of Personal Information with advertising partners or with our business and marketing partners: contact data; demographic; profile data; communications data (excluding contents of communications); transactional data; marketing data; user-generated content; relationship data; financial data; promotion data, data about others, device data, online activity data; communication interaction data; data derived from the above.
